description: Verify the products page is accessible after login and shows a meaningful empty state when user has no product grants

steps.description: Log in with email qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com and password HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Verify the page loads without a 500 error, blank screen, or unhandled exception
Report: what is shown on screen — product cards, empty state message, error, or something else? Screenshot.
Check: is there a meaningful call-to-action for a user with no grants (e.g. 'Get started' or 'Add a product')?

description: Verify the superadmin panel at /admin loads its tabs correctly for an admin user

steps.description: Log in with email vivek@phronex.com and password Phronex.vivek.2026!
If login fails (wrong credentials), report the error and stop — do not proceed further
Verify the admin panel loads (NOT a 403 or blank page)
Verify at least 3 tabs are visible in the admin panel (e.g. Users, System Errors, Analytics, Configuration)
Click each visible tab and verify it loads content without a 500 error or blank state
Report: which tabs loaded successfully? Any broken tabs? Screenshot of admin panel. Note the URL structure.
